justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including specific dates and times, and also correctly interpreted 'next Tuesday' as June 9th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options or suggestions.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to provide new times or days after each unavailability check, leading to a very long and inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and lack of proactive suggestions, making the customer do all the work in finding an available slot.

overall_notes: The agent was able to understand and process all of the user's requests, but its inability to offer alternative suggestions or a broader search made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
